title: eGov-Lens: Code and Dataset
description: Code and dataset for eGov-Lens: A Multi-Dimensional Machine Learning Approach to Aspect-Based Public Feedback Analysis on Bengali e-Government Platforms. This repository includes Bengali public feedback datasets, classical machine learning experiments, transformer-based feature experiments, final results, and entropy-weighted TOPSIS ranking files.
